<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Automation Details"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations/{automationId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Query automation details by automation ID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"automationId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"Automation ID."}]}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"nullable":true,"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["automationId","name","enabled","definitionType","createTime"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"Automation ID."},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Automation name."},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether it is enabled. true: enabled; false: disabled."},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"],"description":"Automation type, as follows: <br />\n- SCRIPT_JSON：**Flow** automation created via API.  \n- SCRIPT_TEXT：**Flow** automation created via Aqara Studio Web page.  \n- WHEN_IF_THEN：**Classic** automation.  \n- LEGACY_FLOW：**Flow** automation (legacy version).  \n- LEGACY_LINKAGE：**Logic** automation.  \n- OTHER：Other automation types.\n"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Creation time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds)"},"manualTriggers":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"List of available manual triggers","items":{"type":"object","required":["triggerNodeId","triggerName"],"properties":{"triggerNodeId":{"type":"string","description":"Manual trigger ID"},"triggerName":{"type":"string","description":"Manual trigger name"}},"title":"AutomationManualTriggerBrief"}},"space":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","name"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"Space ID"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"Parent space ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Space name"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"Space tag"},"children":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"items":"circular(SpaceNode)","description":"Child space list (recursive structure)"}},"title":"SpaceNode"}],"nullable":true,"description":"The current associated space of the automation; if not associated with any space, it is null."}},"title":"AutomationSummary"},{"type":"object","properties":{"config":{"type":"object","nullable":true,"description":"Automation configuration details. - For automations with `definitionType` of `SCRIPT_JSON`, this field contains the full configuration object of the automation. - For all other automation types, an empty object is returned.","additionalProperties":true}}}],"title":"AutomationDetails"}}}],"title":"AutomationDetailsResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request parameter error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx is required"},"description":"Error response.
